description:
Update + news (ig?)!

Not my bot, straight rip-off from Venus Hub.

I'm tired of tokens and i really like this character (plus i can't pay 5$ because my country currency is worthless).

Make sure to give the actual creator some love and please don't hate me.

★ 9 Jun, 2025. Update: am gonna do the rest of the starting messages cause... idk, I'm bored and it's pretty late. But hey, anything for the free bots, right?

I'll be doing another bot I liked, and many others I find around Venus.

But if you wanna make a request about a bot you want here because of my same reason or other, then here's my discord: geoss (who would have thought).

★ Thursday, October 2nd, 2025. Update: Added second message to this bot and set the other on private. Lmk if you want me to leaving like that or change it back to public.

• Upcoming bots (most probably not):
